title: Seasonal Pricing Rules
description: Create rules to automatically override your standard rate plans for specific date ranges, such as holidays or peak seasons.

add_modal.title: Add New Seasonal Rate
add_modal.description: Define a new pricing rule for a specific period. This will override the base rate plan.
add_modal.no_rate_plans_warning: You must create a Rate Plan before you can create a seasonal rate for it.

form.pricing_override_description: Leave fields blank to use the parent rate plan's price. Otherwise, enter a new price for the {{pricingMethod}} method.
form.select_rate_plan_prompt: Please select a rate plan first to see pricing options.

list.no_rules: No seasonal pricing rules have been created yet.

toasts.validation_error_required_fields: Please fill out the name, date range, and select a rate plan.
toasts.conflict_error_description: The selected date range conflicts with an existing active seasonal rate for the same rate plan.
toasts.validation_error_price_required: You must provide at least one override price.
toasts.success_create_description: New seasonal rate has been created.
toasts.error_save_description: Could not save the seasonal rate.
toasts.error_delete_description: Could not delete the seasonal rate.
toasts.success_status_update_description: The status for '{{name}}' has been set to {{status}}.
toasts.error_status_update_description: Could not update the status for the seasonal rate.

delete_dialog.title: Are you sure?
delete_dialog.description: This will permanently delete the '{{name}}' seasonal rate. This action cannot be undone.
